stemHtml: During cruise at high altitude, a fully developed CB with cirrus streaks extending from its anvil is observed along the planned route. What is the recommended course of action?

options.a: Descent to an altitude between cirrus streaks and freezing level to continue on flight planned track to avoid clear icing.
options.b: Increase altitude to overfly the CB and keep clear of visible cloud fragments to avoid ice crystal icing.
options.c: Switch engine- and wing anti-ice ON to avoid any icing, proceed along the flight planned track.
options.d: Keep clear of the cirrus streaks to avoid ice crystal icing, re-route around the CB area.
